role_summary: the international tax consultant advises on cross -border taxation, double taxation  avoidance, and global tax compliance.
responsibilities: • advise on international tax structures and transactions   • analyze dtaa, pe exposure, and withholding taxes   • support cross -border tax compliance and reporting   • assist in international tax audits and assessments   • coordinate with global tax teams and advisors   • monitor global tax law developments
qualifications: • ca with international tax exposure   • strong knowledge of dtaa, oecd guidelines, beps   • analytical and research -oriented mindset
